# Copilot Instructions

## Project Management (GSD)
- This project uses GSD (Get Shit Done) workflows. All planning state lives in `.planning/`.
- Before starting work, read `.planning/STATE.md` for current context and `.planning/ROADMAP.md` for phase status.
- Planning artifacts: `PROJECT.md`, `REQUIREMENTS.md`, `ROADMAP.md`, `STATE.md`, and `phases/` subdirectory.

## Multi-Platform
- This project is also developed in Claude Code CLI and Antigravity IDE — all three share `.planning/` as the single source of truth.
- See `CLAUDE.md` in project root for additional platform-specific notes.
